holdings.infoBox: WTRE is an equity ETF with a total of 69 individual holdings. The top holdings are Equinix stock at 5.40%, Prologis at 5.27%, Digital Realty Trust at 5.20%, Goodman Group at 5.00%, and American Tower at 4.61%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree New Economy Real Estate Fund (WTRE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund tracks a tier-weighted index of global real estate companies that have direct and/or indirect exposure to technology, sciences, or e-commerce. Holdings are selected based on a proprietary technology score and a leverage screening. WTRE was launched on Jun 5, 2007 and is issued by WisdomTree.
infoTable: CenterSquare New Economy Real Estate Index
